features.name: SDR Radio Reception
features.description: Tune RTL-SDR Blog V4 to preset frequencies, demodulate FM/AM/WBFM/SSB via rtl_fm, output 16kHz mono PCM

features.name: Web Stream Ingest
features.description: Pull live audio from public internet streams (LiveATC, NOAA via wxradio.org) using ffmpeg subprocess when no SDR hardware is present

features.name: SDR Auto-Detection
features.description: On startup, run rtl_test to detect RTL-SDR dongle presence. Auto-select SDR mode or Web Stream mode accordingly

features.name: Whisper Speech-to-Text
features.description: Real-time Whisper inference on Hailo-8L NPU with silence detection and automatic CPU fallback via faster-whisper. 10s audio chunks, mel spectrogram, encoder/decoder HEF pipeline with repetition penalty.

features.name: Live Audio Streaming
features.description: HTTP chunked WAV stream from backend to browser for live radio audio playback

features.name: REST API (Tune/Control)
features.description: Flask REST endpoints for tuning, squelch, gain, stop, status, and preset listing

features.name: WebSocket Real-Time Events
features.description: Socket.IO events for transcript delivery, signal level updates, status changes, mode announcements, and error notifications

features.name: Console UI (Web Frontend)
features.description: Single-page web UI with preset selector, signal meter, audio player, transcript feed, and squelch/gain controls

features.name: Frequency Presets (Seattle/Redmond)
features.description: Bundled presets for weather, aviation, marine, public safety, and broadcast frequencies in the Redmond/Seattle area

features.name: Error Handling & Auto-Recovery
features.description: Graceful handling of SDR disconnect, rtl_fm crash, stream drops, ALSA issues, and Hailo NPU absence
features.notes: All tasks complete: SDR disconnect/reconnect detection with auto-recovery, process crash auto-restart (3 retries) with retry button, browser audio reconnect, Hailo NPU fallback.

features.name: ADS-B Flight Tracking & Correlation
features.description: Real-time ADS-B flight tracking via dump1090 correlated with Whisper aviation transcripts. Callsigns spoken on tower/approach frequencies highlight aircraft on a Leaflet.js map. Supports single-dongle (time-sharing) and dual-dongle modes.

features.name: Voice-Activity Audio Segmentation
features.description: Silence-based audio chunking replaces fixed 10s splits. Segments end at silence boundaries to avoid cutting words mid-utterance. Configurable RMS threshold, holdoff timer, min/max segment duration.

features.name: Inference Stats Dashboard
features.description: Real-time NPU/CPU performance metrics in the web UI: encoder/decoder latency, real-time factor, tokens/sec, decoder steps used, chunks processed, silence skip rate. Color-coded RTF indicator.
